name: thyroid US — laterality conflict between Findings and Impression

report.technique: High-resolution greyscale and colour Doppler ultrasound of the thyroid gland.
report.findings: Right lobe: 12 mm hypoechoic solid nodule with punctate echogenic foci, taller-than-wide; peripheral microcalcifications. The contralateral lobe and the isthmus are sonographically benign.
report.impression: 1. Left thyroid lobe 12 mm hypoechoic nodule, TR5 (highly suspicious).
